/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/engine/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/engine/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/engine/particles.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/engine/weather.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/world.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/combat.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/cultivation.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/npc.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/elements.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/bestiary.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/bounty.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/environment.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/alchemy.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/dungeon.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/taming.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/standoff.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/exploration.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/events.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/mounts.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/fishing.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/game/reputation.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/ui/hud.c.o CMakeFiles/murim_game.dir/src/ui/system_ui.c.o -o bin/murim_game  -lraylib -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL
